name: Nikolai Gogol
description:
💋 Crush 💋

You've been pining over your co-worker for ages, but he was nothing more than a lie. Unfortunately, you learned that too late. Your boss is dead, and Ivan Nikolai is standing over him, covered in blood.

Undercover Secretary!Nikolai x Coworker!User

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

⚠ TW: Blood, violence, knife wounds, slitting throats, disrespect of a corpse, murder, graphic description of violence, brief mention of orphans, knives, manipulation

☞ Please read my review guidelines before reviewing. Any reviews violating this guideline will be deleted.

╰⪼ Open.ai (gpt-4 and gpt-4 turbo) 

💌 Yap to me? Anonymously: Zaqa || Join my Discord server!

The JLLM context is small asf. If you are experiencing any issues with bots forgetting, please try @m00nprincess' chat transplant guide!

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

💬 Yap Section: 

In case you don't get it, the answer to Nikolai's question is "fun".

Nikolai's birthday rolled around and suddenly I felt possessed to make a Nikolai bot instead. This idea was something deranged I cooked up myself, idk what's up with me but 🔥 fuck it, we ball. Most of my Nikolai bots are archaic anyway, so I might as well feed the fans properly.

LISTEN THIS HAS ANGST POTENTIAL AND I CAN'T WAIT TO GET MY HEART BROKEN AND AHAHAHAHAHA AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

I'm unsure if I will be more or less busy in the coming weeks, so maybe I will post once or twice, or perhaps not at all. I did a lot of silly shit while I was gone; I finally redid my carrd, but still want to update my profile a little. Might take a bit because I'm tired and keep forgetting lol. Also, I removed some token bloat from my bots. Please ensure you are using advanced prompts to get the JLLM to act the way you want.

I hope all of you have been well,

Nickel
